overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red dress navigating a neon-lit urban environment at night. The character moves from a covered street under an overpass with passing traffic, along a sidewalk with storefronts, and into an open plaza with stairs and a reflection pool.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street under overpass with crosswalk

events.description: black futuristic sedan drives through the crosswalk intersection
character begins walking forward along the sidewalk
teal taxi pulls up and stops at the crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: standing at a crosswalk under the overpass observing passing traffic before beginning to walk

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on
teal taxi stopping at the crosswalk to pick up or drop off

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass covering the street with support pillars
large vertical digital billboard displaying red neon advertisement with face
bold yellow zebra crossing stripes painted on the road surface
metal safety railing separating sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a massive concrete overpass at night, illuminated by neon signs and streetlights. The character stands at a crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass by, including a black sedan and a teal taxi that pulls up. The environment is distinctly cyberpunk with wet reflective surfaces and glowing advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with neon storefronts and security grates

events.description: passing orange building facade with green neon OPEN sign
passing teal neon CHILL OUT sign above metal security grates

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past various shopfronts and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue pants standing near the storefront entrance
tattooed pedestrian walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green neon OPEN sign on orange building facade
teal neon sign reading CHILL OUT above a doorway
metal mesh security grates covering shop windows
illuminated billboard advertisement showing a firearm with DARRA text

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow urban sidewalk lined with storefronts featuring vibrant neon signage. The camera passes an OPEN sign and a CHILL OUT sign above metal security grates, while encountering other pedestrians. The environment remains under the cover of buildings with artificial neon lighting dominating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with stairs and reflection pool

events.description: exits covered sidewalk into open plaza with visible sky and trees
character transitions from walking to running up the stairs

agents.ego_description: moving through the open plaza and running up the wide concrete stairs toward the upper level

entered.detail: wide multi-level concrete staircase leading to upper plaza
shallow water feature reflecting the surrounding neon lights and billboards
large mature trees in the plaza area providing contrast to the urban environment
tall digital advertisement screen showing animated content above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open urban plaza with visible night sky and trees surrounding a reflection pool. The character runs up a wide concrete staircase toward an upper level, with large digital billboards visible in the background. The environment shifts from enclosed neon-lit streets to a more open public space with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, neon-lit urban corridor that gradually opens into a spacious public plaza. It begins under a massive concrete overpass where futuristic vehicles, including a teal taxi, glide across wet, reflective streets illuminated by glowing advertisements. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts to a narrow sidewalk lined with metal security grates and vibrant neon signs, passing pedestrians beneath the oppressive cover of towering buildings. The environment then expands as the character leaves the enclosed street and enters an open plaza featuring trees and a reflection pool under the night sky. Finally, the camera follows the character running up a wide concrete staircase toward an upper level, with massive digital billboards looming in the background.
